25a1(7): 'bci bcu rtsa gnyis gyon gyi brgyu gcig na/ ba ga pa'i sprin 'phro ma ni spos me bsnamsang/ bzi bcu rtsa gnyis g.yas kyi brgyu gnyis /

25a3(7): kyi bcu gsrem na/ kun ta bzang so rin chen rsnye ma bsnamsg/ bzhi brku rsa ba nyis gyon gyi bcu 'sum nag/ gsal ba'i 'od ldab mas ni gyu mar bsgums // 
25a4(7): bzhi brgyu rtsa gnyis g.yas kyi bcu bzhi nang/ 'jam sel gzhon tshun sal mzing ga bsnams / bzhi bcu rtsa gnyis g.yon gyi bcu bzhing nang/ rdog brul gyis mdzadg/ 
25a5(7): ma ni sdje cha' bsnamsg/ bzhi brgyu rtsa gzlin g.yas kri bco lnga nang/ bgogs chen mthar byed bcung byed zo ba brnams/ bzhi brgyu rtsa gnyis g.yon gyi bco lnga na// 
25a6(7): thugs ngam brgul byed ma ni lcags kyu bsnams/ bzhe bcu rtsa gnyis g.yas kyi bcu drug nag/ bszin za mthar byed 'khogs kyi byug ze brnams/ bzhi btsu rtsi / 
25b1(7): gnyis gyon gyi bcu drgr na/ gnas nas brkyon mdzad ma ni zhags sa brnams/ bzhi brcyug ca gnyis b.yas kyi bzu ba na na/ smra mzhang byed 'grugs pa'i spral/ 
25b2(7): zhugs bsnams/ bzhi bcug tsa gnyis g.yon gyi bcu tha na nang/ rtogs bral thugs mdzad ma ni lcags grog brnams / bzhi bcu rtsa gnyis g.yas kyi btso mye na /
